title: Notification No.34/2004-Cus(NT), dated 18.03.2004
text: 18th March, 2004 Notification No. 34/2004 - Customs (N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Board hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue No. 54/2001-CUSTOMS(N.T.), dated the 19th October, 2001, namely :- In the said notification, in the Table, for, S.No,. 11,16,18,20, 21,23,35,37,38,39 and 57 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall respectively be substituted, namely:- (1) (2) (3) "11. DRI/BZU/E/19/96/1906 dated 16.3.98 S/10-18/98 Adj.Cell M/s. Alankrit India, E-329, East of Kailash, New Delhi and 3 other noticees 16. DRI/BZU/E/43/97 dated 23.8.99 G.N.International,15,2nd Floor,111,A,Old Hanuman Lane , Kalbadevi Road, Mumbai-400002 18. DRI/BZU/101/APPG/514/86 dated 26.3.93 M/s. Advani and Sons,A/36, Naraina Industrial Area, Phase-II, New Delhi and 2 other noticee 20. DRI/BZU/F/2(A)/97-IMP CAU/DRI/44/97(58/C(A)APPG-53/97) dated 7.11.97 M/s. Exotic Fashions,G-5, South Extension, Part-II, New Delhi and 2 other noticees 21. DRI/BZU/F/2(A)/97/EXP VIII(HQ)/10/89/97 dated 24.11.97 M/s.
